history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian man with dark, tousled hair and a friendly smile is captured in a medium shot, sitting outdoors at night. He is wearing a black t-shirt with the word "PIXMA" in white lettering across the chest and blue jeans. His left hand is raised, fingers forming a "shaka" or "hang loose" gesture.

The background is dimly lit, suggesting a humble, possibly outdoor eatery or shop. Behind him, a bright green wall is visible, with a corrugated metal shutter to his left. A simple shelf is mounted on the green wall, holding some items. To the right of the man, a broom leans against the wall, and a large plastic bag filled with snacks or goods hangs nearby. The overall lighting is atmospheric, with a strong light source from the left casting shadows and highlighting the man's features. The color palette is dominated by the vibrant green of the wall, the dark tones of the night, and the monochrome of the man's clothing. The mood is casual and relaxed, with a touch of youthful energy conveyed by the man's gesture and expression. The style is photorealistic.
